name: Gas Guzzler Tax Exclusions

eligibility.description: Purchasers can avoid taxes up to $7,700 by selecting vehicles that exceed the 6,000 lb weight threshold or meet the 'nonpassenger' definition (e.g., certain SUVs/trucks).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes vehicles from the gas guzzler tax if they are over 6,000 lbs unloaded GVW, classified as nonpassenger automobiles, or used as emergency vehicles.
